nasb.text: But desert creatures will lie down there, And their houses will be full of owls; Ostriches also will live there, and shaggy goats will frolic there.

esv.text: But wild animals will lie down there, and their houses will be full of howling creatures; there ostriches will dwell, and there wild goats will dance.

cnv.text: 躺臥在那裡的，只有曠野的走獸； 充滿著他們房屋的，只有吼叫著的野獸； 鴕鳥住在那裡，野山羊在那裡跳躍。

ccb.text: 那里躺卧着旷野的走兽， 咆哮的猛兽占满房屋； 鸵鸟住在那里， 野山羊在那里跳跃嬉戏。

csbs.text: 旷野的走兽却会躺卧在那里， 咆哮的野兽必占满他们的房屋， 鸵鸟住在那里，野山羊在那里跳跃，
